lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਨਾਮੁ ਦੇਹੁ ਪਿਆਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: har har amrit naam dehu piaare |
lines.english: O my Beloved Lord, Har, Har, please bless me with Your Ambrosial Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਰਗ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: saarag mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Saarang, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਊਪਰਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਨਿਆ ਤਿਨ ਕੇ ਕਾਜ ਸਵਾਰੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jin aoopar guramukh man maaniaa tin ke kaaj savaare |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Those whose minds are pleased to be Gurmukh - the Lord completes their projects. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਜਨ ਦੀਨ ਭਏ ਗੁਰ ਆਗੈ ਤਿਨ ਕੇ ਦੂਖ ਨਿਵਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: jo jan deen bhe gur aagai tin ke dookh nivaare |
lines.english: Those humble beings who become meek before the Guru-their pains are taken away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਿਰਦੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਰਸੁ ਰਸਨਾ ਰਸੁ ਗਾਵਹਿ ਰਸੁ ਬੀਚਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: hiradai naam amrit ras rasanaa ras gaaveh ras beechaare |
lines.english: Within their hearts is the ambrosial essence of the Naam, the Name of the Lord; they savor this essence, sing the praises of this essence, and contemplate this essence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਭਗਤਿ ਕਰਹਿ ਗੁਰ ਆਗੈ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਵਾਰੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: anadin bhagat kareh gur aagai gur kai sabad savaare |1|
lines.english: Night and day, they perform devotional worship services to the Guru; they are embellished with the Word of the Guru's Shabad. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਰਸੁ ਚੀਨੑਿਆ ਓਇ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਮੋਖ ਦੁਆਰੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: gur parasaad amrit ras cheenaiaa oe paaveh mokh duaare |2|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, they are aware of this ambrosial essence; they find the Gate of Salvation. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਅਚਲੁ ਅਚਲਾ ਮਤਿ ਜਿਸੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਤਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਧਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur purakh achal achalaa mat jis drirrataa naam adhaare |
lines.english: The True is the Primal Being, Unmoving and Unchanging. One who takes the Support of the Naam, the Name of the Lord - his intellect becomes focused and steady.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਆਗੈ ਜੀਉ ਦੇਵਉ ਅਪੁਨਾ ਹਉ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: tis aagai jeeo devau apunaa hau satigur kai balihaare |3|
lines.english: I offer my soul to Him; I am a sacrifice to my True Guru. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਭ੍ਰਮਿ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਲਾਗੇ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਅਗਿਆਨ ਗੁਬਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh bhram doojai bhaae laage antar agiaan gubaare |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs are stuck in doubt and attached to duality; the darkness of spiritual ignorance is within them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਦਾਤਾ ਨਦਰਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਨਾ ਉਰਵਾਰਿ ਨ ਪਾਰੇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: satigur daataa nadar na aavai naa uravaar na paare |4|
lines.english: They do not see the True Guru, the Giver; they are not on this shore, or the other. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬੇ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਰਵਿਆ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਸਰਬ ਕਲਾ ਕਲ ਧਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: sarabe ghatt ghatt raviaa suaamee sarab kalaa kal dhaare |
lines.english: Our Lord and Master is permeating and pervading each and every heart; He is supremely Potent to exercise His Might.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਰਗ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: saarag mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Saarang, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਦਾਸਨਿ ਦਾਸੁ ਕਹਤ ਹੈ ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਲੇਹੁ ਉਬਾਰੇ ॥੫॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak daasan daas kehat hai kar kirapaa lehu ubaare |5|3|
lines.english: Nanak, the slave of His slaves, says, please, be merciful and save me! ||5||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੋਬਿਦ ਕੀ ਐਸੀ ਕਾਰ ਕਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gobid kee aisee kaar kamaae |
lines.english: This is the way to work for the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਰੇ ਸੁ ਸਤਿ ਕਰਿ ਮਾਨਹੁ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਰਹਹੁ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jo kichh kare su sat kar maanahu guramukh naam rahahu liv laae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Whatever He does, accept that as true. As Gurmukh, remain lovingly absorbed in His Name. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੋਬਿਦ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਲਗੀ ਅਤਿ ਮੀਠੀ ਅਵਰ ਵਿਸਰਿ ਸਭ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gobid preet lagee at meetthee avar visar sabh jaae |
lines.english: The Love of the Lord of the Universe seems supremely sweet. Everything else is forgotten.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਰਹਸੁ ਭਇਆ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਨਿਆ ਜੋਤੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: anadin rehas bheaa man maaniaa jotee jot milaae |1|
lines.english: Night and day, he is in ecstasy; his mind is pleased and appeased, and his light merges into the Light. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਿਰਪਾਲ ਭਏ ਤਬ ਪਾਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਚਰਣੀ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: gur kirapaal bhe tab paaeaa har charanee chit laae |2|
lines.english: When the Guru becomes merciful, the mortal finds the Lord; he focuses his consciousness on the Lord's Lotus Feet. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਬ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇ ਤਬ ਹੀ ਮਨੁ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤੈ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਵਸੈ ਮਨਿ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: jab gun gaae tab hee man tripatai saant vasai man aae |
lines.english: Singing the Glorious Praises of the Lord, his mind is satisfied. Peace and tranquility come to abide within his mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਤਿ ਪ੍ਰਗਾਸ ਭਈ ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਇਆ ਗਿਆਨਿ ਤਤਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: mat pragaas bhee har dhiaaeaa giaan tat liv laae |
lines.english: The intellect is enlightened, meditating on the Lord. He remains lovingly attuned to the essence of spiritual wisdom.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਿਰਦੈ ਕਪਟੁ ਨਿਤ ਕਪਟੁ ਕਮਾਵਹਿ ਮੁਖਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਸੁਣਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: hiradai kapatt nit kapatt kamaaveh mukhahu har har sunaae |
lines.english: One whose heart is filled with falsehood, continues to practice falsehood, even while he teaches and preaches about the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਜੋਤਿ ਪ੍ਰਗਟੀ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਨਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਧਿ ਲਗਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: antar jot pragattee man maaniaa har sehaj samaadh lagaae |3|
lines.english: The Divine Light radiates forth deep within his being; his mind is pleased and appeased. He merges intuitively into Celestial Samaadhi. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਲੋਭੁ ਮਹਾ ਗੁਬਾਰਾ ਤੁਹ ਕੂਟੈ ਦੁਖ ਖਾਇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: antar lobh mahaa gubaaraa tuh koottai dukh khaae |4|
lines.english: Within him is the utter darkness of greed. He is thrashed like wheat, and suffers in pain. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਬ ਸੁਪ੍ਰਸੰਨ ਭਏ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਮੇਰੇ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਰਚਾ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jab suprasan bhe prabh mere guramukh parachaa laae |
lines.english: When my God is totally pleased, the mortal tunes in and becomes Gurmukh.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਰਗ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: saarag mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Saarang, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮ ਨਿਰੰਜਨੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਤ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇ ॥੫॥੪॥
lines.translit: naanak naam niranjan paaeaa naam japat sukh paae |5|4|
lines.english: Nanak has obtained the Immaculate Naam, the Name of the Lord. Chanting the Naam, he has found peace. ||5||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰਾ ਮਨੁ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮਿ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: meraa man raam naam man maanee |
lines.english: My mind is pleased and appeased by the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੈ ਹੀਅਰੈ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਲਗਾਈ ਮਨਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਕਥਾ ਸੁਖਾਨੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: merai heearai satigur preet lagaaee man har har kathaa sukhaanee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The True Guru has implanted divine love within my heart. The Sermon of the Lord, Har, Har, is pleasing to my mind. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੀਨ ਦਇਆਲ ਹੋਵਹੁ ਜਨ ਊਪਰਿ ਜਨ ਦੇਵਹੁ ਅਕਥ ਕਹਾਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: deen deaal hovahu jan aoopar jan devahu akath kahaanee |
lines.english: Please be merciful to Your meek and humble servant; please bless Your humble servant with Your Unspoken Speech.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਜਨਾ ਮਿਲਿ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਮੀਠ ਲਗਾਨੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sant janaa mil har ras paaeaa har man tan meetth lagaanee |1|
lines.english: Meeting with the humble Saints, I have found the sublime essence of the Lord. The Lord seems so sweet to my mind and body. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੈ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਤੇ ਬੈਰਾਗੀ ਜਿਨੑ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਪਛਾਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: har kai rang rate bairaagee jina guramat naam pachhaanee |
lines.english: They alone are unattached, who are imbued with the Lord's Love; through the Guru's Teachings, they realize the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨੈਣੀ ਬਿਰਹੁ ਦੇਖਾ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਰਸਨਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਖਾਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: nainee birahu dekhaa prabh suaamee rasanaa naam vakhaanee |
lines.english: With my eyes, I gaze lovingly upon God, my Lord and Master. I chant His Name with my tongue.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੁਰਖੈ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਸਭ ਚੂਕੀ ਆਵਣ ਜਾਨੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: purakhai purakh miliaa sukh paaeaa sabh chookee aavan jaanee |2|
lines.english: Meeting with the Primal Being, one finds peace, and one's comings and goings in reincarnation are ended. ||2||
